titleStmt.title: SII 17.690: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 690. (A.R. No. 634 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.
The details of date, viz., Ānanda, Kumbha••••Tiruvādirai, Sunday corresponds to 1375 A.D., February 10, Sunday, f.d.n. ·17.

This damaged inscription seems to record the grant of certain rights of irrigation, by the inhabitants of Niṉṟai to the mahājanas of Payāṟṟūr. The temple accountant Panmāhēśvara-vēḷāṉ alias Vīṟṟirunda perumāḷ of Pulvēḷūr figures as one of the signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kempaṇa Uṭaiyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa Āṉanta saṅvat sarattuk kumpanāyaṟṟu yum tiruvātiraiyum peṟṟa nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai ṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kuṉṟavattaṉakkoṭṭattu niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭil ṉattu Innāṭṭil kkuṭuttappaṭi Eṅkaḷ Ūril Eṉakku Aṇṇar nūṟṟu Aimpatu
kaṭavar Ākavum veṭṭuvikkum Iṭattu Ikkāli ṉ ṉṟu p payāṟṟūr Erikku viṭakkaṭavom Ākavum Immariāti cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakkakaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṭikkuc cammatittu pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom payāṟṟūril mahājaṉattukku niṉṟaiyil Ūravarom Ippaṭikku Ivai niṉṟai Ūravar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nāyaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cem nāyaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ yūril yāṉ nāyaneṉ Ippa
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyiṟ kaṇakkup pulveḷūr Uṭaiyāṉ (pa)paṉmāhecura veḷāṉ viṟṟirunta perumāḷeṉ
Digital edition of SII 17.690 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
